text: Your body has a right over you.

Take benefit of five before five: your youth before your old age, your health before your sickness, your wealth before your poverty, your free time before your preoccupation, and your life before your death.
The strong believer is better and more beloved to Allah than the weak believer, while there is good in both.
Sitting for long periods is not just bad for your back — it raises your risk of cardiovascular disease, diabetes, and depression. Stand up. Move.
And He it is who created the night and day and the sun and moon. They float, each in an orbit. There is order in all things — including your work and rest.
Make things easy, not difficult. Give glad tidings, not cause for aversion.
Two blessings which many people lose: health and free time.
A 5-minute break every 25-30 minutes can increase total daily productivity by up to 25%. The break is not lost time — it is an investment.
Verily, with every hardship comes ease. With every hardship comes ease.
The best of deeds are those that are consistent, even if they are few.
Stand up, for prolonged sitting causes the spine to compress unevenly. Even 2 minutes of standing resets your posture and boosts alertness.
And your Lord says: Call upon Me, I will respond to you. Indeed, those who are too proud to worship Me will enter Hell humiliated.
